Our Story

Where the City Fades
Into the Night

Perched on the fourth floor of Aryans Building in the heart of Jubilee Hills, So The Sky Kitchen is Hyderabad's most romantic destination — a chic garden escape from the city's rhythm below.

We bring together the finest North Indian classics and globally-inspired flavors, each dish crafted to complement the panoramic views and the warmth of candlelight beneath an open sky.

Garden-style rooftop
Panoramic city views
North Indian & Pan Asian
Curated beverage menu
Romantic ambiance
Open until midnight
So The Sky Kitchen — Gallery

Culinary Journey

The Menu

Kebabs, curries, and pan-Asian signatures crafted for the discerning palate — each plate a story told under open skies.

Seafood
Tandoori Jheenga
Succulent tiger prawns marinated in a smoky tandoori masala, char-grilled to perfection in the clay oven.
₹ 680Chef's Pick
Vegetarian
Paneer Tikka
Hand-cut cottage cheese cubes marinated in yoghurt and spices, slow-roasted with peppers and onions.
₹ 420Bestseller
Awadhi
Dahi Ke Kebab
Delicate hung curd patties blended with aromatic herbs and spices — a timeless Awadhi classic.
₹ 380Vegetarian
Fusion
Bay Prawns Tempura
Delicate bay prawns in a whisper-thin Japanese tempura batter, served with a citrus ponzu dipping sauce.
₹ 560Pan Asian
Vegetarian
Malai Broccoli
Tender broccoli florets marinated in cream, cashew paste, and mild spices, finished in the tandoor.
₹ 340Light
Snack
Crispy Chilly Potato
Golden crispy potato tossed in a bold Indo-Chinese sauce with fresh green chillies and spring onion.
₹ 290Popular
Dum Biryani
Chicken Biryani
Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked with tender chicken, saffron, and whole spices in a sealed handi.
₹ 480Bestseller
Dum Biryani
Mutton Biryani
Slow-braised mutton on the bone layered with saffron rice and fried onions — a regal preparation.
₹ 580Signature
Curry
Dal Bukhara
Whole black lentils simmered overnight with tomatoes, cream and butter — rich, velvety, and deeply comforting.
₹ 360Vegetarian
Chocolate
Dark Chocolate Brownie
Dense, fudgy brownie made with 70% Belgian dark chocolate, served warm with vanilla bean ice cream.
₹ 280Must Try
French Classic
Saffron Crème Brûlée
A silken vanilla custard perfumed with Kashmiri saffron and finished with a crackling caramelised sugar crust.
₹ 320Chef's Pick
Indulgent
Chocolava Cake
A warm molten chocolate cake with a flowing dark chocolate centre, paired with a scoop of ice cream.
₹ 310Bestseller
Signature Mocktail
Anarkali
A regal blend of pomegranate, rose water, and a hint of cardamom — florally complex and refreshingly light.
₹ 220Signature
Classic Mocktail
Blue Lagoon
Blue curaçao syrup, lychee, and sparkling water create this striking turquoise evening refresher.
₹ 200Popular
Sparkling
House Ginger Ale
Housemade ginger ale with fresh ginger, lemon, and just the right fizz — clean, crisp, and endlessly refreshing.
₹ 160Refreshing

The Atmosphere

An Evening Like No Other

01
✦
Rooftop Sanctuary
A chic garden rooftop on the fourth floor of Jubilee Hills — your elevated escape from the city, open to the sky and stars above Hyderabad.
02
◈
Romantic Setting
Warm candlelight, string lights, and lush greenery frame every table. Whether a date night or a celebration, the ambiance is always enchanting.
03
◉
Scenic Views
Panoramic views of the Jubilee Hills skyline set the stage as the evening unfolds — a living backdrop to every meal, every conversation.

Guest Voices

What Our Guests Say

4.0
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
2,974 Google Reviews
★★★★★
"Very good restaurant, tasty food, good service but pricy. The view from the rooftop makes it worth every rupee."
— Google Review
★★★★☆
"Nice place only at night. The atmosphere transforms beautifully after sundown — string lights, open sky, and good food."
— Google Review
★★★★☆
"The biryani had such a beautiful mix — carrot, beans, paneer, mint, and crispy fried onions. A vegetarian's dream biryani."
— Google Review
